calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate; Declaration Of Service Re: Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Nov-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DAVID AYERDI Notice of Hearing on Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandate. Appearances: Albert J. Garcia, Esq. Attorney at Law, (510) 848-5190 appearing for Petitioner and Moving party(Petitioner David Ayerdi, also present in Court); Paul D. Gifford, Esq. State of California, Office of Atty. Gen., (510) 622-2253, appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Hearing held. The Court hears argument. Ruling: The Court takes the matter under submission. (The Court retains the Administrative record lodged by the Petitioner. Transcript was lodged by Respondent.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
